Staff log in

•••

Clear current cart?

This will remove every item in the cart and keep the checkout screen ready for a new sale.

⚠️ Destructive action — cannot be undone ⚠️

🚨 Reset test data?

Will be cleared from this device:

  • Saved sales (all bills)
  • Void audit log
  • Per-day inventory (starting, added, sample, low alert)
  • Global / online / event allocation

Will stay on this device:

  • Send Later queue (use Clear Pending separately)
  • Operator login session (use 🔒 Log out)
  • Saved customer emails (use 📧 Clear Emails)

This is a developer/admin action for pre-event cleanup. It does not log who reset, so use it before live selling, not during.

Enter reset passcode to enable

Void this bill?

This permanently removes the bill from saved sales and re-aligns inventory carry-forward. The void is logged for audit. This cannot be undone except by re-creating the sale.

Add inventory today?

Confirm this top-up before it changes the active day stock.

Approve free scarf override?

This customer is below THB 2,000. Add the free scarf anyway and record it as a manual override in the sale CSV?

Payment reminder

Please make sure you have seen the payment evidence before marking this payment as confirmed.

Email receipt request

You will receive the email receipt in 3-4 days after the event.

Check the email address

Please enter a valid email format before saving this sale.

Bill correction log unlocked

Exception handling only. Review each change carefully because every correction will be recorded and inventory will be recalculated from the corrected bill.

Correction Center

Enter the 3-digit passcode to review bill corrections or controlled inventory corrections. This is a local workflow control, not device-level security.

Correction Center

Controlled exception workflows for bill corrections and inventory corrections with review and audit history.

Select the bill that needs correction. Bills with past edits are flagged.
